title: englerina concinna
intro: Englerina concinna, also known as the African mistletoe, is a parasitic plant that belongs to the family Loranthaceae. It has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Englerina concinna include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. Englerina concinna is typically prepared for use in herbal medicine through decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
